title: HUNV — 100-point rescue jingle (Robotron)
tldr: Bright climbing GWAVE preset celebrating a 100-point human rescue. Wavetable + ascending pattern, longer than DP1V but punchier than HBDV.
how: GWAVE preset specific to Robotron's `$20` slot. Uses a square/sine hybrid wavetable and a short ascending pattern (`HBTSND`) — produces a confident "ding-dong-ding" sweep that signals "you saved someone, +100 points".
watch: GWAVE engine view — climbing pitch pattern, short total duration.
Stage swimlane — single band of HUNV / GWLD / GWAVE.
